pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0523)

output.summary: Multi-pass legal TTT runs three score-first streaming passes with shifted orders and per-token min scoring so every token sees adapted context.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal TTT adaptation trains solely on validation shards after scoring each token, so all updates occur on validation data.
techniques: Per-token min over passes for sliding-window–style scoring
Rotary cache clone fix for RoPE backprop during TTT
